zh.Penthièvre, Morbihan, France: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福

zh.Penthievre, Morbihan, Brittany, France: 法國布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Orguen Hawise Normandy於1025年出生在法國布列塔尼時，她的父親Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille22歲，母親Judith de Nantes30歲。她和Bardolf Forfin Penthievre至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1078年1月7日在法國布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福享年53歲。

zh-hans.Penthievre, Morbihan, Brittany, France: 法国布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Orguen Hawise Normandy于1025年出生在法国布列塔尼时，她的父亲Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille22岁，母亲Judith de Nantes30岁。她和Bardolf Forfin Penthievre至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1078年1月7日在法国布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Normandy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Normandin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Orguen Hawise Normandy was born in 1025, in Brittany, France, her father, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, was 22 and her mother, Judith de Nantes, was 30. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Bardolf Forfin Penthievre. She died on 7 January 1078, in Penthièvre, Morbihan, Brittany, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Orguen Hawise Normandy est née en 1025, à Bretagne, France, son père, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Judith de Nantes, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Bardolf Forfin Penthievre. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1078, à Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Orguen Hawise Normandy 1025 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille 22 und ihre Mutter Judith de Nantes 30. Sie hatte mit Bardolf Forfin Penthievre mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1078 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Orguen Hawise Normandy è nata il nel 1025 nel Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Judith de Nantes, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Bardolf Forfin Penthievre. Morì il 7 gennaio 1078, nel Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Orguen Hawise Normandyが1025年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Alain III Craignart de Cornouailleは22歳，母Judith de Nantesは30歳であった。彼女はBardolf Forfin Penthievreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1078年1月7日にフランスブレタグンモービハンペンスイevアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Orguen Hawise Normandy(이)가 1025년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith de Nantes(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Bardolf Forfin Penthievre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1078년 1월 7일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 펜스이e브르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Orguen Hawise Normandy nasceu em 1025, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Nantes, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Bardolf Forfin Penthievre. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1078, em Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Orguen Hawise Normandy родилась в 1025 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Judith de Nantes, 30. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Bardolf Forfin Penthievre. Она умерла 7 января 1078 г. в местности пентиeвр, морбихань, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Orguen Hawise Normandy nació en 1025, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Judith de Nantes, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Bardolf Forfin Penthievre. Murió el 7 de enero de 1078, en Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
